appraisal_events.evidence: Bloch ... bondir ... venir féliciter la récitante ... et fit tant de bruit pour regagner sa place que Rachel dut attendre plus de cinq minutes avant de réciter la seconde poésie.
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch makes himself socially awkward and ostentatious, disrupting the session and attracting implicit disapproval.

status_effects.explanation: His loud and inappropriate intervention causes him to be poorly judged in the social context.
